goal: Add a side-effect-free operator approval gate for BPK-066 release governance handoff packets, requiring explicit approval refs and closed merge/external-action gates without GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, packages, or deployment.
scope_out: Do not read files, call GitHub, create PRs, merge, write files, change workflows, change package files, change deployment files, or mutate external state.
claims: Release governance handoffs can be gated by explicit operator approval without merge.
Ready BPK-066 handoff and approval refs are required.
Merge and external actions remain false.
assumptions: The gate feeds later human/operator release action only.
dod: Ready, missing approval ref, and blocked handoff cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Filesystem reads, GitHub calls, PR creation, merge, writes, workflow changes, package changes, deployment changes, or external state mutation become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-066 bundled release governance decisions into operator handoff packets without merge.
